title: Why Dont the Eva pilots get paid
display_title: Why Dont the Eva pilots get paid
wikitext:
[]: Why Don't the Eva pilots get paid? Post by Themaninblack » Tue Oct 30, 2007 2:45 pm We never really hear about Shinji getting handed a paycheck...and we really should. He has a JOB!! Maybe this is because I'm an objectvist but I'd wouldn't pilot the Eva until I was given at least a 6 digit salary, after all what better way to put pressure on them to get it...and its not like Shinji and the other pilots don't deserve it. They are doing the most imporant job in the world, that only 5 people on Earth can do. Hell I understand why Shinji rans away from Nerv so much...he's not getting anything out of piloting the Eva but pain in the ass.

[]: Post by Angel Slayer » Tue Oct 30, 2007 2:47 pm BECAUSE GENDO IS A TOTAL BASTARD!!!

[]: Post by Wevangeliwon » Tue Oct 30, 2007 3:45 pm Maybe they think children don't need money for saving humanity, you know. Saving the world is underappreciated these days.

[]: Post by Angel Slayer » Tue Oct 30, 2007 3:49 pm ONCE AGAIN IT IS BECAUSE GENDO IS A BASTARD!!!

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Tue Oct 30, 2007 3:52 pm Or the fact that if they don't pilot the Evangelions the world ends. That might be a slight more impacting than a paycheck.

[]: Post by Angel Slayer » Tue Oct 30, 2007 3:54 pm If I piloted an EVA, and I didn't get paid, that would make the world end, especially after I added decent weapons to the EVA, which will be discussed in the following post/thread

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Tue Oct 30, 2007 4:07 pm If they got paid, then they would have to abide by the rules and regulations of child labor laws. Without money, they can just be considered "volunteers" are can be subjected to all sorts of long hours and tortuous situations.

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Oct 30, 2007 4:15 pm I wouldn't call what the Eva pilots do a "job" to be honest. Plus, Shinji doesn't need to give two weeks notice so he can storm off as often as he likes :]

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Oct 30, 2007 4:22 pm They should get paid. But Shinji is a mess to demand so, Asuka doesn't care and Rei.. is just Rei. But Nerv's a bitch. All those who work there, bitch about their salaries silently. Poor Misato, doesn't even have the money to buy a dress for another wedding. Or for buying all the remaining beers in her territory

[]: Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 30, 2007 4:25 pm Hey Dad Im gonna "volunteer" to pilot a mind raping robot!

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Oct 30, 2007 4:25 pm Don't know if this should be locked, but there was a similar thread recently: [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2742&highlight=salaries[/url]

[]: Post by Themaninblack » Tue Oct 30, 2007 5:13 pm ...From what I've seen never once are the Eva pilots mentioned. Well anyays, Cops save Amercia from crime but are PAID...if I saved the world every day I think I would derseve once agian AT LEAST a six figure income.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Oct 30, 2007 5:20 pm Angel Slayer wrote: If I piloted an EVA, and I didn't get paid, that would make the world end, especially after I added decent weapons to the EVA, which will be discussed in the following post/thread

[]: Post by Kaminoyouni » Tue Oct 30, 2007 5:28 pm because SEELE is liberal

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 30, 2007 5:52 pm ...Um, there's a thread already about this. :?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 30, 2007 6:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...Um, there's a thread already about this. :?
summary: []: Why Don't the Eva pilots get paid? Post by Themaninblack » Tue Oct 30, 2007 2:45 pm We never really hear about Shinji getting handed a paycheck...and we really should. He has a JOB!! Maybe this is because I'm an objectvist but I'd wouldn't pilot the Eva until I was given at least a 6 digit salary, after all what better way to put pressure on them to get it...and its not like Shinji and the other pilots don't deserve it. They are doing the most imporant job in the world,
